questions.question: Design a half subtractor and a full subtractor for the given inputs A, B, and Cin. Compare their truth tables.
questions.hint: Consider the borrow from the full subtractor

questions.question: What is the difference in terms of clock period and power consumption between a full subtractor and a half subtractor?
questions.hint: Compare the clock periods and power consumption of the two circuits

questions.question: A half subtractor is used to implement the subtraction of two binary numbers. What is the output of the half subtractor when A = 110 and B = 101?
questions.hint: Use the truth table of the half subtractor
